philosophy.notes: Automotive corporate brand identity — deep navy conveys power and stability. Clean, professional layout matches a large manufacturer. Could push 'powerful' visual weight further with bolder typography on hero.

hierarchy.notes: Hero slider is strong first anchor. Sections flow logically from welcome → products → services → stats → news → CTA. Product filtering provides clear secondary navigation. CTAs could be more prominent on subpages.

execution.notes: Consistent typography (Peyda), spacing, and alignment throughout all 7 pages. RTL layout correct. Shared CSS system works. Form validation functional. Hero slider, mobile menu, scroll reveal all working. Minor: no actual map on contact page (placeholder).

specificity.notes: All copy is specific to Borna Khodro — real Persian-language product names, service descriptions, history. No generic filler or lorem ipsum. Stats are illustrative prototypes (150k units, 200+ agencies). Product filter categories relevant to vehicle types.

restraint.notes: Single accent (navy #133e87) used consistently. One decisive visual element per section. No competing gradients or flourishes. Clean card-based layouts. Could simplify the hero pattern overlay further.
